metadata.objective: Transform MVP (6/10 production readiness) to battle-tested enterprise platform (9/10) with auto-captions, filler removal, auto-reframe, multi-platform export, long-to-shorts extraction, and fitness-specific intelligence

stories.title: Set up background task queue with Redis and RQ
stories.description: Replace synchronous video processing with async background jobs. Install Redis + RQ, create job submission endpoint, status polling, and webhook notifications on completion.
acceptance_criteria: backend/task_queue.py exists with submit_job(), get_status(), cancel_job() functions
Jobs persist across server restarts (Redis persistence)
Worker process starts via 'rq worker' command

stories.title: Add SQLite database with migrations
stories.description: Create persistent storage for jobs, content, users, and analytics. Use SQLAlchemy with Alembic migrations for schema management.
acceptance_criteria: backend/database.py exists with engine, session, Base class
backend/models.py defines Job, Content, User, Analytics models
Database file created at data/fitness.db on first run
All existing endpoints use database instead of in-memory storage

stories.title: Implement structured JSON logging
stories.description: Replace print statements with structured logging. Include request_id, user_id, endpoint, duration, status in every log. Add log rotation and Railway-compatible output.
acceptance_criteria: Every request has unique request_id in logs
Log format: {timestamp, level, request_id, endpoint, user_id, duration_ms, status, metadata}
Error logs include stack traces and context
Logs rotate at 10MB with 5 file retention
All print() statements replaced with logger calls

stories.title: Add rate limiting and user quotas
stories.description: Implement per-user rate limits using slowapi. Define tier-based quotas (free: 5 videos/day, pro: 50/day). Return 429 with retry-after header when limits exceeded.
acceptance_criteria: Free tier: 5 video jobs/day, 10 captions/day, 20 exports/day
Pro tier: 50 video jobs/day, unlimited captions, unlimited exports
429 response includes X-RateLimit-Remaining and Retry-After headers
Rate limit state persists in Redis
stories.checkpoint_reason: Infrastructure complete - validate queue, database, logging, rate limiting before building features

stories.title: Integrate OpenAI Whisper for transcription
stories.description: Add speech-to-text capability using OpenAI Whisper API. Support word-level timestamps for caption sync. Handle multiple languages (en, es, pt).
acceptance_criteria: Supports language detection and forced language
Maximum 25MB audio file limit with chunking for longer
Cost tracking: logs tokens used per transcription
Fallback to local Whisper if API fails

stories.title: Build word-level caption generator
stories.description: Create captions that highlight words as they're spoken (karaoke-style). Use transcription timestamps to sync text with audio.
acceptance_criteria: Word highlighting syncs within 50ms of speech
Auto line-break at punctuation and pauses
Outputs: embedded video, SRT file, VTT file

stories.title: Create 10 caption style templates
stories.description: Build preset caption styles matching competitor quality. Include trending TikTok styles, professional styles, and fitness-specific styles.
acceptance_criteria: Styles: trending, glow, minimal, bold, clean, neon, subtitle, fitness, professional, dramatic
Each style defines: font, size, color, outline, shadow, animation, position
Styles render correctly on all platforms (tested visually)

stories.title: Add caption position and font customization API
stories.description: Allow users to customize caption position (top/center/bottom), font family, size, colors. Create POST /api/video/caption endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/video/caption endpoint accepts: video_url, style, position, language, word_highlight, max_words_per_line, custom_font, custom_colors
Position options: top, center, bottom with pixel offset support
Color supports hex codes and named colors
Completed job returns video_url with embedded captions + SRT file
stories.checkpoint_reason: Caption system complete - validate transcription accuracy, style rendering, and API before video enhancement

stories.title: Build filler word detection engine
stories.description: Detect verbal fillers (um, uh, like, you know, so, basically, actually) using transcription with context awareness. Distinguish intentional vs filler usage.
acceptance_criteria: Detects: um, uh, like, you know, so, basically, actually, right, I mean
Context-aware: 'So, here's the plan' keeps 'so', 'So, um, yeah' removes 'so'
Handles word clusters (multiple fillers in sequence)

stories.title: Implement smooth audio and video removal for fillers
stories.description: Remove detected fillers with smooth audio crossfade and visual jump cut. Preserve natural speech rhythm.
acceptance_criteria: Audio crossfade: 50ms fade in/out at cut points
Video jump cut synced with audio removal
No audio pops or clicks at edit points
Sensitivity modes: aggressive (remove all), moderate (high confidence), conservative (very high confidence)

stories.title: Create auto-reframe engine with aspect ratio conversion
stories.description: Convert videos between aspect ratios (16:9 to 9:16, etc.) using intelligent cropping. Keep subjects centered in frame.
acceptance_criteria: Center-crop fallback when no subjects detected
Motion smoothing to prevent jerky camera movement

stories.title: Add face and body tracking for reframe
stories.description: Use MediaPipe or OpenCV for face/body detection. Track subjects across frames for smooth reframing. Handle multiple subjects with priority.
acceptance_criteria: Face detection using MediaPipe Face Detection
Tracking maintains subject identity across frames
Multiple subject handling with user-configurable priority
stories.checkpoint_reason: Video enhancement complete - validate filler removal quality, reframe accuracy before platform export

stories.title: Build multi-platform export presets
stories.description: Create optimized export settings for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, Twitter. Handle resolution, bitrate, codec, container.
acceptance_criteria: Duration limits enforced per platform with warning

stories.title: Add platform-specific caption styling
stories.description: Adapt caption styles per platform. TikTok gets casual/trending, LinkedIn gets professional, YouTube gets SEO-optimized text.
acceptance_criteria: TikTok: trending style, emoji-friendly, casual language
Auto-converts caption style based on target platform

stories.title: Implement hashtag and description generator
stories.description: Generate platform-optimized hashtags and descriptions using AI. Include trending hashtags, niche-specific tags, and SEO keywords.
acceptance_criteria: Hashtag generation: 5-30 tags based on platform limits
Description generation: platform-appropriate length and tone

stories.title: Create batch export workflow
stories.description: Export single video to all platforms at once. Queue parallel jobs, return all URLs when complete. POST /api/video/export endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/video/export accepts: video_url, platforms[], include_captions, generate_descriptions, hashtag_count
Returns batch job_id with progress for each platform
Failed platform exports don't block others
Webhook notification when all exports complete
stories.checkpoint_reason: Platform export complete - validate exports work on actual platforms before content repurposing

stories.title: Build long-form video analyzer
stories.description: Analyze 10-60 minute videos to identify structure, key moments, and potential clips. Extract audio energy, keyword density, visual action.
acceptance_criteria: Audio energy analysis: identifies peaks and valleys
Keyword density: extracts key terms from transcription

stories.title: Implement viral moment detection
stories.description: Score video segments for viral potential. Identify 5-10 best clips from long-form content using engagement prediction algorithm.
acceptance_criteria: Viral score (0-100) based on: hook_strength, audio_energy, visual_variety, keyword_density, emotional_markers
Returns top 10 segments with scores and timestamps
Fitness-specific boosters: transformation moments, form demonstrations

stories.title: Create hook analyzer and optimizer
stories.description: Analyze first 3 seconds of video for hook effectiveness. Score and suggest improvements. Generate alternative hook variants.
acceptance_criteria: Hook score (0-100) based on: action, curiosity, emotion, audio_impact
Suggests improvements: reorder shots, add text overlay, change music
A/B test tracking for hook performance

stories.title: Add retention curve predictor
stories.description: Predict audience retention before publishing. Identify drop-off points and suggest edits. Compare against platform benchmarks.
acceptance_criteria: Platform benchmarks: TikTok (50% good), YouTube (45% good), IG (40% good)
Improvement suggestions for each cliff moment
Accuracy validation against actual retention (future enhancement)
stories.checkpoint_reason: Content repurposing complete - validate long-to-shorts pipeline before fitness intelligence

stories.title: Build workout timer overlay system
stories.description: Add HIIT timers, rep counters, and interval indicators as video overlays. Support multiple timer presets and customization.
acceptance_criteria: Timer types: countdown, countup, interval (work/rest), rep_counter
Position options: top_left, top_right, bottom_left, bottom_right, center
Style options: minimal, bold, neon, digital
Timer sync with audio cues (optional beeps)

stories.title: Create form annotation tools
stories.description: Allow adding arrows, circles, and text labels to highlight exercise form. Support slow-motion segments with annotations.
acceptance_criteria: Annotation types: arrow, circle, line, text, highlight_box
Arrow: animated, points from start to end coordinates
Circle: pulsing, highlights area of focus
Text: floating label with optional background
Annotations persist across frames (motion tracking optional)

stories.title: Implement exercise recognition
stories.description: Detect exercise type from video using pose estimation. Support 20+ common exercises. Auto-generate video descriptions.
acceptance_criteria: Supports 20 exercises: squat, deadlift, bench, row, pullup, lunge, plank, pushup, curl, press, etc.

stories.title: Final integration, battle testing, and documentation
stories.description: Integrate all features, run comprehensive battle tests, fix edge cases, update API documentation and MCP package.
acceptance_criteria: Battle test suite: 50+ test cases covering input variety, audio quality, content types, durations, stress tests
Edge case handling documented and tested
OpenAPI documentation updated with all endpoints
CHANGELOG updated with v2.0.0 release notes
stories.checkpoint_reason: Full v2.0 complete - final validation before release
